workflowId.cachedResultName: FIN - Processar regra faturamento mensal (corrigido anti-loop)

parameters.errorMessage: ={{ 'FIN faturamento (fin_v3): execução com falhas. failureCount=' + String($json.summary?.failureCount || 0) + ', failedRules=' + String($json.summary?.failedRules || 0) + ', malformed=' + String($json.summary?.malformedResults || 0) + ', firstFailure=' + String($json.run?.failures?.[0]?.node || 'n/a') + ':' + String($json.run?.failures?.[0]?.reason || 'n/a') + ', integrity=' + String(Array.isArray($json.summary?.integrityErrors) ? $json.summary.integrityErrors.join('|') : '') + ', competencia=' + String($json.summary?.competenciaYMD || 'n/a') }}
